attempt_reference.description: Identifier of a payment attempt (should not be used in a data mining)

ip.description: The IP address from which a connection with the Profiler was established

proxied_for_ip.description: The IP address on behalf of which the proxy connected to the profiler

signals.description: Unusual fact or behaviors that may indicate fraud

addr.description: Use `ip` field in root fingerprint object response. IP address declared by the user

extra_health.description: Battery's health status, same as battery_health field, but as an integer value. 1 - BATTERY_HEALTH_UNKNOWN, 2 - BATTERY_HEALTH_GOOD, 3 - BATTERY_HEALTH_OVERHEAT, 4 - BATTERY_HEALTH_DEAD, 5 - BATTERY_HEALTH_OVER_VOLTAGE, 6 - BATTERY_HEALTH_UNSPECIFIED_FAILURE, 7 - BATTERY_HEALTH_COLD

extra_level.description: Battery's level as an unscaled value - values: [0, extra_scale_level]

extra_plugged.description: Battery's plugged mode, same as plugged field, but as an integer value. 0 - battery (default), 1 - BATTERY_PLUGGED_AC, 2 - BATTERY_PLUGGED_USB, 4 - BATTERY_PLUGGED_WIRELESS

extra_status.description: Battery's charging status, same as charging_state field, bus as an integer value. 1 - BATTERY_STATUS_UNKNOWN, 2 - BATTERY_STATUS_CHARGING, 3 - BATTERY_STATUS_DISCHARGING, 4 - BATTERY_STATUS_NOT_CHARGING, 5 - BATTERY_STATUS_FULL

extra_present.description: Specifies whether battery is present or not

extra_technology.description: Describes the technology of the current battery

extra_temperature.description: Integer containing the current battery temperature

extra_voltage.description: Integer containing the current battery voltage level

country.description: Describes the ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code equivalent for the SIM provider's country code

allows_voip.description: True if the system supports SIP-based VOIP API

icc_card.description: Specifies whether ICC card is present

roaming.description: True if the device is considered roaming on the current network, for GSM purposes

sim_state.description:
State of the device `SIM` card in a logical slot.
0 - SIM_STATE_UNKNOWN, 1 - SIM_STATE_ABSENT, 2 - SIM_STATE_PIN_REQUIRED, 3 - SIM_STATE_PUK_REQUIRED, 4- SIM_STATE_NETWORK_LOCKED, 5 - SIM_STATE_READY, 6 - SIM_STATE_NOT_READY, 7 - SIM_STATE_PERM_DISABLED, 8 - SIM_STATE_CARD_IO_ERROR, 9 - SIM_STATE_CARD_RESTRICTED, 10 - SIM_STATE_LOADED, 11 - SIM_STATE_PRESENT

radio_phone_type.description: Specifies the device's phone radio type. This indicates the type of radio used to transmit voice calls. 0 - PHONE_TYPE_NONE, 1 - PHONE_TYPE_GSM, 2 - PHONE_TYPE_CDMA, 3 - PHONE_TYPE_SIP

network_type.description: Indicates the radio technology (network type) currently in use on the device for data transmission. 0 - NETWORK_TYPE_UNKNOWN, 1 - NETWORK_TYPE_GPRS, 2 - NETWORK_TYPE_EDGE, 3 - NETWORK_TYPE_UMTS, 4 - NETWORK_TYPE_HSDPA, 5 - NETWORK_TYPE_HSUPA, 6 - NETWORK_TYPE_HSPA, 7 - NETWORK_TYPE_CDMA, 8 - NETWORK_TYPE_EVDO_0, 9 - NETWORK_TYPE_EVDO_A, 10 - NETWORK_TYPE_EVDO_B, 11 - NETWORK_TYPE_1xRTT, 12 - NETWORK_TYPE_IDEN, 13 - NETWORK_TYPE_LTE, 14 - NETWORK_TYPE_EHRPD, 15 - NETWORK_TYPE_HSPAP, 16 - NETWORK_TYPE_NR

total_space.description: Total disk space in bytes (both used space and free space)

free_space_root.description: The total number of bytes that are free on the file system, including bytes from reserved blocks (that are not available to normal applications)

android_id.description: Unique identifier of a device (from Android SDK)

model.description: Device's model name, value the same as a property: ro.product.model

manufacturer.description: Device's manufacturer name, value the same as a property: ro.product.manufacturer

brand.description: Device's brand name, value the same as a property: ro.product.brand

build_fingerprint.description: Unique Android build identifier, concatenated string of brand, name, device, release version, id, version incremental, type and tags fields.

product.description: Device's product name, value the same as a property: ro.product.name

http_proxy.description: Proxy settings applied on a device. Host name and port for global http proxy. Uses : separator between host and port.

wifi_on.description: Specifies whether WiFi is present or not

bt_on.description: Specifies whether bluetooth is present or not
